name: agents-dev
postCreateCommand: npm install -g @devcontainers/cli @github/copilot && curl -fsSL https://claude.ai/install.sh | bash && git config --global credential.helper store && TOKEN=$(grep github.com ~/.git-credentials | sed 's|https://[^:]*:\([^@]*\)@.*|\1|') && echo "export GITHUB_TOKEN=$TOKEN" >> ~/.bashrc && echo "export GH_TOKEN=$TOKEN" >> ~/.bashrc
